creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 258825
rebased patch

This is the rebased patch, running in the project main gitrepo and tested by security key users.

It is mainly for extending an existing patch in the tree, which is discussing with the upstream.  I think we either remove the local patch entirely (but need to figure out how to support key options) or modifying the existing patch for letting it recognize more key types.

This is a need in the cluster, please merge it.
